briefdescription.para: Install an asynchronous handler function for the given HandlerType:

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the instance to be worked on.
HandlerType
indicates what interrupt handler type is. XEMACPS_HANDLER_DMASEND, XEMACPS_HANDLER_DMARECV and XEMACPS_HANDLER_ERROR.
FuncPointer
is the pointer to the callback function
CallBackRef
is the upper layer callback reference passed back when when the callback function is invoked.
None.

simplesect.para: There is no assert on the CallBackRef since the driver doesn't know what it is.

briefdescription.para: Master interrupt handler for EMAC driver.

detaileddescription.para: This routine will query the status of the device, bump statistics, and invoke user callbacks.
This routine must be connected to an interrupt controller using OS/BSP specific methods.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XEMACPS instance that has caused the interrupt.
